$comment: Positive fixture for PRD-101. A correctly-discoverable static manifest at /.well-known/act.json. The manifest declares delivery: "static" and the discovery context (an unauthenticated GET of the well-known path on the public origin) matches that declaration. Validators MUST accept this case under PRD-101-R1, PRD-101-R2, PRD-101-R12. The manifest envelope itself is owned by PRD-100; only the discovery-relevant fields are reproduced here.

expected.notes: Manifest delivery field is "static"; discovery happened via the well-known path with no Link-header runtime hand-off. PRD-101-R12 satisfied.
